qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: CanInstall middleware AJAX bypass allows unauthenticated admin account takeover
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding describes an authentication bypass in Bagisto's installer middleware via AJAX header manipulation. The advisory describes SSTI in customer profile name parameters. Both affect Bagisto but target different components (installer vs customer profile), different vulnerability classes (auth bypass vs SSTI), and different root causes (middleware logic error vs template injection).

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated SVG review attachment upload enables stored cross-site scripting
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding describes stored XSS via SVG file uploads in Bagisto product review attachments. The advisory describes SSTI via first/last name parameters in customer profiles. Both affect Bagisto but target different components (review upload vs customer profile), different vulnerability classes (XSS vs SSTI), and different root causes (missing SVG sanitization vs template injection in name fields).

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The advisory GHSA-mqhg-v22x-pqj8 describes Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI) via first_name and last_name parameters in Bagisto customer profiles, allowing authenticated low-privileged users to inject template expressions like {{7*7}} that execute on the server. Neither qualifying finding identifies this vulnerable code path or root cause. Finding 'installer-ajax-bypass' describes authentication bypass in the installer middleware, which is a different vulnerability class and component. Finding 'svg-review-xss' describes XSS via SVG uploads in product reviews, also a different vulnerability class and component. While both findings target the same repository (Bagisto), they do not identify the advisory-described SSTI vulnerability in customer profile name rendering.
evidence: Advisory summary: SSTI via first_name and last_name in customer profiles ({{7*7}} -> 49)
Advisory affected component: /customer/account/profile endpoint with template injection in name fields
Advisory vulnerability class: CWE-1336 (Improper Neutralization of Proxy Elements)
Finding 'installer-ajax-bypass': Auth bypass via middleware - different vulnerability class (auth bypass vs SSTI), different component (installer vs profile)
Finding 'svg-review-xss': Stored XSS via SVG upload - different vulnerability class (XSS vs SSTI), different component (review vs profile)
